content: Walkthrough generated: WT-20260220-phase2-assistant-registration. 860 lines covering 6 files in progressive reading order. 7 sections: High-Level Summary, Platform Channel Bridge (Kotlin/Dart timing), State Management Layer (Riverpod watch/read, Notifier vs StateNotifier), Session Lifecycle Defensive Guards (3 guards with race condition diagrams), Orchestration Layer (app.dart cold-start flow), Key Concepts Summary, Testing and Debugging. Connected to ADR-0004 (offline-first) and ADR-0007 (constructor injection). Includes full gesture-to-greeting data flow trace, provider pattern comparison table, and testing code examples. Bloom levels: Understand (60%), Apply (30%), Analyze (10%). Estimated reading time: 18 minutes. Mastery tier: Tier 2.
